title: Frontend Debugging and Problem-Solving Mastery
summary: Sharpen practical debugging techniques and systematic problem-solving catered for frontend engineers.
personalizationNote: Leverage your existing backend and system debugging skills to master frontend-specific tools and workflows.
learningObjectives: Identify and fix common JS, CSS, and rendering bugs
knowledgeChecks: What DevTools panel helps inspect CSS styles?
Describe a methodical approach to solving bugs.
narrationScript:
Scene 1: Navigating Browser Developer Tools
Use Elements to edit HTML/CSS live, Console for errors and testing, Sources for breakpoints, and Network to trace API calls.

Scene 2: Debugging Common JavaScript Errors
Set breakpoints to halt execution, step through code line by line, and review call stacks to trace errors back to their source.

Scene 3: Fixing CSS Rendering Issues
Use computed styles to see active CSS rules and override them as needed. Understanding specificity helps you apply intended styles reliably.

Scene 4: Structured Problem-Solving Workflow
Isolate the problem area, form a hypothesis, test it, and document the fix so you learn and prevent regressions.

slides.title: Navigating Browser Developer Tools
slides.speakerNotes: Familiarize yourself with DevTools panels to inspect DOM, monitor network calls, and debug scripts in real time.
slides.narration: Use Elements to edit HTML/CSS live, Console for errors and testing, Sources for breakpoints, and Network to trace API calls.

slides.title: Debugging Common JavaScript Errors
slides.speakerNotes: Breakpoints let you pause code execution and inspect variables, revealing where things go wrong in complex logic.
slides.narration: Set breakpoints to halt execution, step through code line by line, and review call stacks to trace errors back to their source.

slides.title: Fixing CSS Rendering Issues
slides.speakerNotes: Visual glitches often stem from CSS issues. We'll explore how to inspect and resolve difficult style conflicts efficiently.
slides.narration: Use computed styles to see active CSS rules and override them as needed. Understanding specificity helps you apply intended styles reliably.
slides.visualCue: Side-by-side visual of style changes via DevTools

slides.title: Structured Problem-Solving Workflow
slides.speakerNotes: Approach bugs methodically by reproducing consistently, hypothesizing causes, and verifying solutions before permanent fixes.
slides.narration: Isolate the problem area, form a hypothesis, test it, and document the fix so you learn and prevent regressions.
